response.justification: The candidate is a broad, capable engineer with strong software-craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and some exposure to high-throughput microservices, but the resume does not demonstrate the core requirement of 8 years of C++ programming — C/C++ work is limited to LabWindows/CVI components and a bachelor thesis, with the bulk of the career in DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript. There is also no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale infrastructure ownership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test tooling
Some high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of requests/sec)
Mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, talks)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8 years C++ requirement; C/C++ exposure is minimal
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership
Core stack (DLang, Node.js, TS) misaligned with the role's C++/systems focus
